# NextGen Analytics
> Data analytics consultancy by Muhammad Affaf specializing in Power BI and business intelligence.

NextGen Analytics is a Karachi-based Power BI and data analytics consultancy founded by Muhammad Affaf. We help SMEs turn raw data into interactive dashboards, automated ETL pipelines, and cloud data solutions.

## Founder
- Muhammad Affaf — Power BI Data Analyst, Karachi Pakistan
- Email: muhammadaffaf746@gmail.com
- Location: Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan
- Contact Number: +923042365964

## Services
- [Power BI Dashboards](https://affaf12.github.io/portfolio/#services): Interactive KPI dashboards and data modeling
- [Data Analytics & Reporting](https://affaf12.github.io/portfolio/#services): SQL, Excel, Power BI analysis
- [Automation & ETL](https://affaf12.github.io/portfolio/#services): Python, Power Automate pipelines
- [Cloud Data Solutions](https://affaf12.github.io/portfolio/#services): Azure-based scalable systems

## Featured Projects
- [Financial Sales & Profitability Dashboard](https://github.com/affaf12/Financial-Sales-Profitability-Dashboard): Finance-ready Power BI model with DAX
- [Telco Customer Churn Analysis](https://github.com/affaf12/Telco-Customer-Churn-Analysis): Churn prediction dashboard
- [Delivery Data Chatbot](https://delivery-chatbot-scwqochc7mtnkykkayatxn.streamlit.app): Streamlit AI chatbot for logistics
